parameters.content:
## AKcelerateHQ Free Audit Auto-Proposal System - FIXED

This workflow starts when a new Google Form row is added.

It now correctly creates:
- Clean lead fields
- Lead score and lead type
- Recommended package
- Personalized HTML email proposal
- Premium WhatsApp proposal message
- Proposal log in Google Sheets
- Internal notification

Fix applied: removed broken chatbot AI Agent path that expected webhook data instead of Google Sheet data.

## Setup Required

Before activating:

1. Connect Google Sheets Trigger credential
2. Connect Gmail credential
3. Create a sheet tab named: Proposal Log
4. Replace PASTE_WASSENGER_API_TOKEN_HERE in WhatsApp node
5. Confirm your Google Form sheet tab is selected in trigger

Optional:
- Change prices inside the Code node
- Change email design inside the Code node
- Change WhatsApp tone inside the Code node

nodes.name: Google Sheets Trigger - New Audit Form Row

conditions.leftValue: ={{ $json["I agree that AKcelerateHQ may contact me regarding my automation audit request.  "] || 'yes' }}

parameters.content:
## Proposal Generator - FIXED

This Code node now generates all fields used later:
- work_email
- contact_no
- whatsapp_to
- full_name
- company_name
- email_subject
- email_html
- whatsapp_message
- internal_notification
- lead_score
- lead_type
- recommended_package
- follow_up_date

This fixes the previous missing-field issue.

nodes.name: Code - Score Lead and Generate Proposal

parameters.content:
## WhatsApp Setup

This fixed workflow uses Wassenger API because your uploaded file already had Wassenger.

Replace in HTTP node URL:
PASTE_WASSENGER_API_TOKEN_HERE

Expected body:
{
  phone: whatsapp_to,
  message: whatsapp_message
}

If you use AiSensy, WATI, Interakt, WAHA, or Meta Cloud API, replace only this HTTP node.

nodes.name: IF - Has Email and WhatsApp Number

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Audit Lead Missing Contact Details - ' + ($json.company_name || $json.full_name || 'Unknown') }}
parameters.message:
={{ 'A new audit form was submitted but work email or WhatsApp number is missing.

Name: ' + ($json.full_name || '') + '
Company: ' + ($json.company_name || '') + '
Email: ' + ($json.work_email || '') + '
Phone: ' + ($json.contact_no || '') }}

main.node: Code - Score Lead and Generate Proposal
IF - Has Email and WhatsApp Number
